heading: Administration and enforcement of Convention
label: 5006 Administration and enforcement of Convention
notes: CodificationTitle VIII of and enacted identical sections. Title VIII of was repealed by .Pub. L. 102–567Pub. L. 102–587Pub. L. 102–587Pub. L. 106–562

children.heading: Responsibilities
children.label: a Responsibilities
children.text: The Secretary of Commerce shall be responsible for administering provisions of the Convention, this chapter, and regulations issued under this chapter. The Secretary, in consultation with the Secretary of Commerce and the Secretary of Transportation, shall be responsible for coordinating the participation of the United States in the Commission.

shall, in consultation with the Secretary of Transportation and the United States Section, issue such regulations as may be necessary to carry out the purposes and objectives of the Convention and this chapter; and
may, with the concurrence of the Secretary, cooperate with the authorized officials of the government of any Party.
